Package main

Class Election

java.lang.Object
main.Election
public class Election extends Object
Election is the main driver class of the voting system. It prompts the user for election information, processes the ballot file, and invokes the appropriate voting algorithm.

    • Election

      public Election()

  • Method Details

    • promptForInput

      public void promptForInput(Scanner scanner) throws Exception
      Prompts user for input on election information.
      Parameters:
      scanner - scanner object used to read user input to store election type, ballot file name, and number of seats
      Throws:
      Exception - throws an exception if there are invalid inputs

    • getInput

      public InitialInput getInput()
      Gets input for the elction.
      Returns:
      the initial input object that contains election setup information.

    • getCandidates

      public String[] getCandidates()
      Gets string array of candidates for election.
      Returns:
      String array of candidates

    • setCandidates

      public void setCandidates(String[] candidates)
      Sets the candidates for the election.
      Parameters:
      candidates - An array of strings representing the candidates' names.

    • setInput

      public void setInput(InitialInput input)
      Sets the initial input for the election.
      Parameters:
      input - The InitialInput object that contains configuration details for the election.

    • getBallots

      public List<Ballot> getBallots()
      Gets list of ballots cast in election.
      Returns:
      list of ballot objects

    • getNumSeats

      public int getNumSeats()
      Gets number of seats.
      Returns:
      number of seats

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      Main method to run election program. Initializes the election, prompts the user for input, processes the ballot file, and runs the election.
      Parameters:
      args - command line arguments
